message:
Improve indexing status visibility (sux.1)

- Add prominent indexing banner in empty results area with progress bar
- Enhance footer indicator with phase-specific icons (🔍📦⏳)
- Add "results may be incomplete" warning during indexing
- Show partial results warning in top-right when results + indexing active
- Distinguish between rebuild (blocks search) and incremental update
- Add get_indexing_state helper for consistent progress state access

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
